pkgmetadata.longdescription: Tombi (鳶 /toɴbi/) is a powerful toolkit that provides a TOML Formatter, Linter, and Language Server Protocol to help you maintain clean and consistent TOML files. It works out of the box with zero configuration. If needed, you can still customize its behavior to match your team's preferences. Tombi's concept is to allow any team or project to work on a TOML file with the same rules from the beginning.
